hooks.hook_text: POV: your 6-year-old just saw a 40-foot T-Rex frozen in Arctic ice
hooks.visual_opener: Close-up of wide-eyed child looking up

hooks.hook_text: POV: you just discovered dinosaurs lived in the Arctic and no one told you
hooks.visual_opener: Person's shocked face in museum lighting

hooks.hook_text: POV: you thought you knew dinosaurs until you met the ice giants
hooks.visual_opener: Massive skeleton emerging from fog effect

hooks.hook_text: They found dinosaur fossils in the Arctic... wait for the size reveal
Walking into the ice cave exhibit... wait for it
Kids think they're seeing regular dinosaurs... wait for the twist
Her face when she realized this Triceratops survived Arctic winters
hooks.visual_opener: Woman's expression changing from confusion to amazement

hooks.hook_text: Dad's reaction to finding out his kid knows more about ice dinosaurs than he does
hooks.visual_opener: Father looking bewildered while child explains

hooks.hook_text: Teacher's face when 30 kids start asking if dinosaurs built igloos
hooks.visual_opener: Overwhelmed educator surrounded by excited children

hooks.hook_text: Can you walk through the ice age without getting chills?
hooks.visual_opener: Person entering misty, cold-looking exhibit space

hooks.hook_text: Bet you can't name 3 Arctic dinosaur species after seeing this exhibit
hooks.visual_opener: Multiple dinosaur silhouettes against aurora backdrop

hooks.hook_text: Can your kids handle meeting a dinosaur that survived -40°F winters?
hooks.visual_opener: Intimidating ice-covered skeleton looming over visitors

hooks.hook_text: Ice Dinosaurs closes January 15th and your kids still think T-Rex lived in deserts
Everyone's posting about ice dinosaurs except you
hooks.visual_opener: Social media feed filled with exhibition posts

hooks.hook_text: This is the only place in North America showing Arctic dinosaur fossils and you're not there
hooks.visual_opener: Unique fossil display with 'World Exclusive' banner
